channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Southern California chemical tank at risk of exploding as 50,000 residents are ordered to evacuate
item.description: Authorities are bracing for the possibility that a damaged chemical tank at a facility in Southern California could leak or explode.

item.title: Democrats vow a redistricting counterpunch but are facing hurdles Republicans don’t
Oldest Pearl Harbor survivor is keeping memory of the surprise bombing alive at 106
